name: youtube-seo
instructions:
YouTube SEO 2026 - optimize across 5 pillars:

**1. Metadata:**
- Title: Under 60 chars, keyword front-loaded
- Description: 200-500 words, keyword in first 125 chars
- Tags: 10+ (exact keyword, variations, related)
- Hashtags: 3-5 relevant including #Shorts for Shorts

**2. Thumbnail CTR:**
- Target: 8-12% CTR
- Custom thumbnails: 89% of top videos have them
- High contrast, expressive faces, large readable text

**3. Watch Time:**
- Target: 50%+ average view duration
- Pattern interrupts every 60-90 seconds
- Front-load value in first 10 seconds

**4. Shorts Optimization:**
- First 2 seconds = 70% of retention
- Target: 80%+ completion rate
- Loop rate = strong signal
- 30-50 seconds optimal
- Use trending audio
- Post 3-5 daily for algorithm testing

**5. Channel Authority:**
- 15-25 videos on topic within 90 days
- Consistent niche publishing
- Shorts boost long-form (3x subscriber conversion)

**Key Stats:**
- 70% of views from recommendations
- Videos 8-9 min perform best in search
- 94% top videos have custom transcripts
